description: The SegmentMesh component is an evolved form of SlotSegmentMesh the behavior is identical, except when not provided slots it will use local coordinate points instead.

fields.Radius: The radius of the line from ``PointA``/``SlotA`` to ``PointB``/``SlotB``
fields.PointA: The starting point of the generated line in local space.
fields.PointB: The ending point of the generated line in local space.
fields.SlotA: The starting point of the generated line. This will be used instead of ``PointA`` if provided.
fields.SlotB: The ending point of the generated line. This will be used instead of ``PointB`` if provided.
fields.Shading: Whether to use different shading like smooth or flat.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to see the geometry. Don't forget to use a Material.
